headline: IT stocks power Nifty, Sensex higher; Bank Nifty underperforms as financials drag
gist: Nifty +0.22% to 24,132.6, Sensex +0.35% to 77,457 on IT-led gains (HCL Tech, Tech Mahindra); Bank Nifty -0.27%, Axis Bank among laggards

headline: RBI approves Rajiv Kumar as HDFC Bank part-time Chairman for 3-year term
gist: RBI approval effective July 15, removes governance overhang for HDFC Bank

headline: Bank Nifty underperforming broader market, down 0.27%
gist: Axis Bank among session's biggest laggards, index trading near day lows below VWAP

headline: US natural gas slides to 2-month low
gist: NG=F -1.37% to $2.88, pressured by Freeport LNG maintenance trapping supply and cooler weather cutting cooling demand

headline: Gold retreats from highs on hawkish Fed bets, firm dollar
gist: GC=F -0.43% to $4,034.40, faded off day high $4,071.90 ahead of Philly Fed index and jobless claims data; silver tracked lower

headline: US strikes pound Iran for 5th day; tanker disabled with Hellfire strike near Kharg Island
gist: WTI $79.47 (-0.16%), Brent ~$84.8; Hormuz shipping near standstill despite prior US-Iran MoU, naval blockade in effect

headline: HDFC Life Q1: new business premium +12% YoY, VNB +9% but margins slip
gist: NBP Rs8,143cr (+12% YoY), APE +9% to Rs3,515cr, VNB +9% to Rs879cr, new-business margins fell

headline: UPDATE: Oil reverses lower as US-Iran strikes reach 6th day, traders lock in gains
gist: WTI $78.45 (-0.85%), off this week's 1-month high near $80.87; profit-taking despite continued Hormuz strikes and Iran retaliation on US Gulf bases

headline: UPDATE: Nat gas hits fresh 2-month low as EIA reports 43 Bcf storage build
gist: NG=F $2.846 (-2.67%); storage surplus widens to 181 Bcf above 5-yr avg, Freeport LNG maintenance outage still trapping domestic supply

headline: UPDATE: Gold slides toward $4,000 handle on oil-driven inflation angst
gist: GC=F $3,991.30 (-1.49%); firmer June retail sales and Hormuz-driven oil spike curb Fed rate-cut bets, dollar holds firm

headline: Silver can't hold $57, tracks gold weakness
gist: SI=F $56.17 (-2.21%), cautious risk mood amid ongoing Iran conflict

headline: Wipro Q1: revenue +10.6% YoY to Rs24,479cr, net profit flat at Rs3,356cr
gist: Revenue +10.6% YoY to Rs24,478.6cr, PAT +0.6% YoY / -1.5% QoQ to Rs3,356.3cr; interim dividend Rs2/share; Q2 IT services guidance $2,574-2,627mn

headline: Tech Mahindra Q1: PAT jumps 28% YoY to Rs1,465cr, 3rd straight $1bn+ deal-win quarter
gist: PAT +28.4% YoY to Rs1,465cr, revenue +17.7% YoY to Rs15,712cr, EBIT margin 14.4% (+330bps YoY); deal wins >$1bn for 3rd consecutive quarter

headline: Reliance board meets today to approve Q1 results
gist: Board meeting + analyst call scheduled July 17; Street expects ~20% QoQ jump in consolidated profit to ~Rs20,451cr on strong O2C/refining margins

headline: Wall St falls on chip-stock selloff; Asia mixed, GIFT Nifty signals muted open
gist: S&P -0.51% to 7,533.77, Nasdaq -1.47% to 25,881.95 on chip-stock weakness (TSMC capex outlook, Alphabet); Nikkei -2.6%, Hang Seng +2.1%; GIFT Nifty ~flat/cautious pre-open

headline: WTI holds near one-month highs as US-Iran clashes pass a week
gist: WTI $78.98 (+0.89% intraday), Brent ~$85; naval blockade near Strait of Hormuz persists though EIA says oil flows (8.5M bbl Sunday) continue
